message:
feat(tui): show context-sensitive footer hints for History file tree focus

When the History mode file tree has focus, the footer now shows
tree-specific controls (j/k tree, Enter filter, Esc close tree)
instead of the commit-centric hints. Adds Tab/search/link hints
to non-tree-focus footer for consistency with Board and Insights.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
